title: Department Manager Vacancy at Star Bazaar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Star Bazaar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Bazaar! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Bazaar:
Star Bazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar!
